# GO IRL AI Development Rules

Before implementing any feature, always read:

1. docs/PRODUCT_PHILOSOPHY.md
2. docs/GO_IRL_CONSTITUTION.md

Every implementation must support the mission:

"Help people spend less time in the app and more time meeting in real life."

Do not propose features that increase engagement without increasing real-life interaction.

Do not turn GO IRL into:
- a social network;
- a content feed;
- a messenger;
- a dating app without safety;
- an AI chatbot for its own sake.

The main metric is not screen time.

The main metric is real meetings created.
